task_completion.description: Navigate to the OpenMRS Scheduler management page
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser displays the OpenMRS Administration page, specifically the 'Manage Scheduler Tasks' or 'Scheduler' section.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct task name and description
task_completion.visual_evidence: A task configuration form is visible with the Name field containing exactly 'Hourly Alert Sync' and the Description field containing 'Background task to sync system alerts every hour'.
The 'Schedulable Class' field in the task configuration form contains exactly 'org.openmrs.scheduler.tasks.AlertReminderTask'.

task_completion.description: Configure the repeat interval and startup behavior
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Repeat Interval' field is set to '3600' (seconds) and the 'Start on Startup' checkbox is checked/enabled.

task_completion.description: Save the task and ensure it is actively running
task_completion.visual_evidence: The scheduler task list shows 'Hourly Alert Sync' in the list of tasks, and its status indicates it is currently running or started (e.g., a 'Started' status text, a green checkmark, or an active stop button indicating it is already running).

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser GUI to configure the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the OpenMRS web interface in a browser, rather than using terminal curl commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual OpenMRS application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the standard OpenMRS Administration UI, not a text editor, mock HTML page, or local file.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct database queries to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are visible showing MySQL or PostgreSQL INSERT/UPDATE commands targeting the 'scheduler_task_config' table.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating an OpenMRS scheduler task with the following exact values: Name: 'Hourly Alert Sync', Schedulable Class: 'org.openmrs.scheduler.tasks.AlertReminderTask', Repeat Interval: 3600 (seconds), Start on Startup: enabled (true/1), and Status: Started (running). The class 'org.openmrs.scheduler.tasks.AlertReminderTask' is a valid, documented OpenMRS class.
